summary: CACHING FEATURES VERIFIED: All Service Worker and localStorage caching features are working correctly. 1) sw.js registered with CACHE_NAME 'vexlypos-v3', 2) Cache Storage contains all required static assets (/, /index.html, /manifest.json, /icon-192.png, /icon-512.png) plus 9 JS bundles from /static/, 3) localStorage 'vexly_mesas' populated with 22 tables after navigating to /tables page, 4) localStorage 'vexly_orders' populated after clicking on occupied table. No console errors detected.

tests.name: JS Bundles Cached
tests.details: 9 JS bundles from /static/ cached after navigation

tests.name: vexly_mesas
tests.details: Populated with 22 tables after navigating to /tables page

tests.name: vexly_orders
tests.details: Populated with 1 order after clicking on occupied Table 3

tests.name: Table Map Loads
tests.details: Mapa de Mesas page loads with all tables displayed correctly

vexly_orders.trigger: ordersAPI.getTableOrders() called when clicking occupied table

context_for_next_testing_agent: Caching features are fully implemented and working. sw.js uses CACHE_NAME 'vexlypos-v3' with fault-tolerant caching (individual cache.add() with catch). api.js tablesAPI.list() and ordersAPI.list()/getTableOrders() save to localStorage on success and read from it when offline. All tests pass.
